---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

<!-- FULL VIEW ABOUT US HERO WITH CONCAVE FLANKING IMAGES -->
::: {.column-screen .about-hero-row}
::: {.grid style="--bs-gutter-x: 0; align-items: center; margin: 0; padding: 0;"}

<!-- Left Side Image: Concave on the right edge -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3 .about-img-left}
![](images/bannerNew.jpg){.about-concave-left alt="Geospatial Fieldwork"}
:::

<!-- Center Content: Main Heading and About Narrative -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .about-text-center}
# Who We Are

Prime Geospatial was founded to bring rigorous landscape ecology metrics, robust data cleaning, and reproducible analytical pipelines directly to environmental planning challenges. We transform complex spatial observations into clear, data-driven frameworks.
:::

<!-- Right Side Image: Concave on the left edge -->
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3 .about-img-right}
![](images/bannerNew.jpg){.about-concave-right alt="Geospatial Analysis"}
:::

:::
:::



:::::: grid

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Our Philosophy

At Prime Geospatial, our mission is to elevate the standard of spatial data science through technical rigor, transparency, and advanced ecological modeling. We believe that environmental decision-making is only as strong as the data behind it—and the expertise applied to interpret that data.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}
### Technical Foundation

The foundation of Prime Geospatial is built upon years of academic and professional engagement with cutting-edge spatial technologies. We do not just process data; we interpret it within the context of landscape ecology theory and statistical integrity.
:::
::::::

<br>

<!-- CORE COMPETENCIES SECTION -->
::: {.container style="padding-top: 4rem; padding-bottom: 4rem;"}

<h2 style="font-size: 2.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #2A5A5C; margin-bottom: 2.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #eaeaea; padding-bottom: 10px;">Our Core Competencies</h2>

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .competency-card}
### Spatial Data Science
Advanced R and Python workflows for raster analysis and complex data visualization.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .competency-card}
### Ecological Modeling
Theoretical landscape ecology, focusing on the critical distinction between configuration and spatial patterns.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .competency-card}
### Statistical Rigor
Expertise in spatial statistics and reproducible research practices to ensure scientific integrity.
:::

:::
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Professional Standards

- **Reproducibility:** Utilizing version control and open-science standards in every project.
- **Technical Precision:** A focus on logic-based, systematic approaches to spatial problems.
- **Interdisciplinary Collaboration:** Leveraging academic expertise to solve real-world environmental management challenges.
